content.text:
[cron:074e3ed9-88e5-48aa-8012-e776e417ba16 ghl-sla-watchdog-30m] L2 AUTONOMY WATCHDOG: Check GoHighLevel for leads/opportunities with no follow-up activity for >24h and inbound leads waiting >10 minutes. For each qualifying item, apply only approved low-risk actions: (1) add/update tags for status, (2) create a follow-up task with due time, (3) nudge opportunity stage forward only when clear event evidence exists (e.g., reply received, booking completed). For task work, use ONLY contact-scoped endpoints: read existing tasks with GET /contacts/{contactId}/tasks?locationId=TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn&limit=100, and create only when no matching open task exists via POST /contacts/{contactId}/tasks using payload {title, body, dueDate, completed:false}. When inspecting existing tasks, normalize from tasks, data.tasks, or data arrays; compare both title and name fields; normalize punctuation/whitespace; and treat a task as open unless completed=true or status is completed/done/closed. Reuse the existing task when the normalized title/name matches the intended prefix or the normalized body already contains the same follow-up text. Do NOT probe /tasks, /tasks/, or /contacts/tasks. Do not send outbound messages. Return a short summary only if any actions were applied; otherwise return blank.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 19:01 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-22 00:01 UTC

arguments.command: node -e "const fetch=global.fetch; const base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com'; const loc='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn'; const tok=process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN; if(!tok){console.error('NO_TOKEN'); process.exit(2);} const h={Authorization:'Bearer '+tok,Version:'2021-07-28',Accept:'application/json'}; (async()=>{for(const p of ['/opportunities/?locationId='+loc+'&limit=5','/contacts/?locationId='+loc+'&limit=5']){try{const r=await fetch(base+p,{headers:h}); const t=await r.text(); console.log('URL',p,'STATUS',r.status); console.log(t.slice(0,500));}catch(e){console.log('ERR',p,e.message)}}})();"

arguments.command: node -e "const base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com';const loc='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn';const tok=process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN;const h={Authorization:'Bearer '+tok,Version:'2021-07-28',Accept:'application/json','Content-Type':'application/json'};const now=new Date('2026-03-22T00:01:00Z');const H24=24*60*60*1000;const M10=10*60*1000;const norm=s=>(s||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFKC').replace(/[\p{P}\p{S}]+/gu,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const open=t=>!(t?.completed===true||['completed','done','closed'].includes(String(t?.status||'').toLowerCase()));(async()=>{const cr=await fetch(base+'/contacts/?locationId='+loc+'&limit=100',{headers:h});const cj=await cr.json();const contacts=(cj.contacts||cj.data?.contacts||[]);const or=await fetch(base+'/opportunities/search?location_id='+loc+'&limit=100',{headers:h});const oj=await or.json();const opps=(oj.opportunities||oj.data?.opportunities||[]);console.log('contacts',contacts.length,'opps',opps.length);let stale=0,inbound=0;for(const c of contacts){const added=new Date(c.dateAdded||0);const updated=new Date(c.dateUpdated||c.dateAdded||0);if(now-updated>H24)stale++;if(now-added>M10 && now-added<H24)inbound++;}console.log('staleContacts24h',stale,'inbound>10m<24h',inbound);let staleOpp=0;for(const o of opps){const d=new Date(o.dateUpdated||o.lastStatusChangeAt||o.createdAt||o.dateAdded||0);if(now-d>H24)staleOpp++;}console.log('staleOpp24h',staleOpp);console.log('sample opp keys',Object.keys(opps[0]||{}));})();"

content.partialJson: {"command":"node -e \"const base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com';const loc='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn';const tok=process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN;const h={Authorization:'Bearer '+tok,Version:'2021-07-28',Accept:'application/json','Content-Type':'application/json'};const now=new Date('2026-03-22T00:01:00Z');const H24=24*60*60*1000;const M10=10*60*1000;const norm=s=>(s||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFKC').replace(/[\\p{P}\\p{S}]+/gu,' ').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').trim();const open=t=>!(t?.completed===true||['completed','done','closed'].includes(String(t?.status||'').toLowerCase()));(async()=>{const cr=await fetch(base+'/contacts/?locationId='+loc+'&limit=100',{headers:h});const cj=await cr.json();const contacts=(cj.contacts||cj.data?.contacts||[]);const or=await fetch(base+'/opportunities/search?location_id='+loc+'&limit=100',{headers:h});const oj=await or.json();const opps=(oj.opportunities||oj.data?.opportunities||[]);console.log('contacts',contacts.length,'opps',opps.length);let stale=0,inbound=0;for(const c of contacts){const added=new Date(c.dateAdded||0);const updated=new Date(c.dateUpdated||c.dateAdded||0);if(now-updated>H24)stale++;if(now-added>M10 && now-added<H24)inbound++;}console.log('staleContacts24h',stale,'inbound>10m<24h',inbound);let staleOpp=0;for(const o of opps){const d=new Date(o.dateUpdated||o.lastStatusChangeAt||o.createdAt||o.dateAdded||0);if(now-d>H24)staleOpp++;}console.log('staleOpp24h',staleOpp);console.log('sample opp keys',Object.keys(opps[0]||{}));})();\"","workdir":"C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.openclaw\\workspace"}

arguments.command: node -e "const base='https://services.leadconnectorhq.com';const loc='TW8JsPW5NMnA3tfK2XLn';const tok=process.env.GHL_PRIVATE_INTEGRATION_TOKEN;if(!tok){console.log('');process.exit(0);}const H={Authorization:'Bearer '+tok,Version:'2021-07-28',Accept:'application/json','Content-Type':'application/json'};const now=new Date('2026-03-22T00:01:00Z');const H24=24*60*60*1000;const M10=10*60*1000;const norm=s=>(s||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFKC').replace(/[\p{P}\p{S}]+/gu,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const isOpen=t=>!(t?.completed===true||['completed','done','closed'].includes(String(t?.status||'').toLowerCase()));async function getJSON(url,opts={}){const r=await fetch(url,{headers:H,...opts});const txt=await r.text();let j={};try{j=txt?JSON.parse(txt):{};}catch{} if(!r.ok) throw new Error(r.status+' '+url+' '+txt.slice(0,180)); return j;}async function addTags(contactId,tags){if(!tags.length)return false;await getJSON(base+'/contacts/'+contactId+'/tags',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({tags})});return true;}async function getTasks(contactId){const j=await getJSON(base+'/contacts/'+contactId+'/tasks?locationId='+loc+'&limit=100');const arr=Array.isArray(j.tasks)?j.tasks:Array.isArray(j?.data?.tasks)?j.data.tasks:Array.isArray(j?.data)?j.data:[];return arr;}function hasMatchingOpenTask(tasks,titlePrefix,bodyText){const np=norm(titlePrefix);const nb=norm(bodyText);for(const t of tasks){if(!isOpen(t)) continue;const nt=norm(t.title||t.name||'');const bt=norm(t.body||t.description||'');if(nt.startsWith(np) || (nb && bt.includes(nb))) return true;}return false;}async function createTask(contactId,title,body,dueDate){await getJSON(base+'/contacts/'+contactId+'/tasks',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify({title,body,dueDate,completed:false})});} (async()=>{const contacts=(await getJSON(base+'/contacts/?locationId='+loc+'&limit=100')).contacts||[];const opps=(await getJSON(base+'/opportunities/search?location_id='+loc+'&limit=100')).opportunities||[];const byId=new Map(contacts.map(c=>[c.id,c]));for(const o of opps){if(o.contactId && !byId.has(o.contactId) && o.contact) byId.set(o.contactId,o.contact);}const candidates=new Map();for(const c of byId.values()){if(!c?.id) continue;const added=new Date(c.dateAdded||0);const updated=new Date(c.dateUpdated||c.dateAdded||0);if((now-updated)>H24) candidates.set(c.id,{...(candidates.get(c.id)||{}),contact:c,stale24h:true});if((now-added)>M10 && (now-added)<H24) candidates.set(c.id,{...(candidates.get(c.id)||{}),contact:c,inbound10m:true});}for(const o of opps){const t=new Date(o.updatedAt||o.lastStatusChangeAt||o.lastStageChangeAt||o.createdAt||0);if((now-t)>H24 && o.contactId){const c=byId.get(o.contactId)||{id:o.contactId,tags:[]};candidates.set(o.contactId,{...(candidates.get(o.contactId)||{}),contact:c,stale24h:true});}}let tagAdds=0, taskCreates=0;for(const [cid,item] of candidates){const c=item.contact||{};const existing=new Set((c.tags||[]).map(x=>String(x)));const toAdd=[];if(item.stale24h && !existing.has('needs-followup-24h')) toAdd.push('needs-followup-24h');if(item.inbound10m && !existing.has('l2-inbound-waiting-10m')) toAdd.push('l2-inbound-waiting-10m');if(toAdd.length){await addTags(cid,toAdd);tagAdds+=toAdd.length;}const tasks=await getTasks(cid);if(item.stale24h){const title='Follow-up required: no activity >24h';const body='L2 watchdog: No follow-up activity detected for over 24 hours. Review contact/opportunity and perform next approved follow-up action.';if(!hasMatchingOpenTask(tasks,'Follow-up required: no activity',body)){const due=new Date(now.getTime()+60*60*1000).toISOString();await createTask(cid,title,body,due);taskCreates++;}}if(item.inbound10m){const title='URGENT: First follow-up due (>10m waiting)';const body='L2 watchdog: New inbound lead has been waiting over 10 minutes without confirmed follow-up. Prioritize first response workflow.';if(!hasMatchingOpenTask(tasks,'URGENT: First follow-up due',body)){const due=new Date(now.getTime()+5*60*1000).toISOString();await createTask(cid,title,body,due);taskCreates++;}}}const actions=tagAdds+taskCreates; if(actions>0){console.log('Applied '+actions+' actions ('+tagAdds+' tag updates, '+taskCreates+' tasks created).');} else {console.log('');}})().catch(e=>{console.error('ERR',e.message);process.exit(1);});"

candidates.set(c.id,{...(candidates.get(c.id)||{}),contact:c,inbound10m:true});}for(const o of opps){const t=new Date(o.updatedAt||o.lastStatusChangeAt||o.lastStageChangeAt||o.createdAt||0);if((now-t)>H24 && o.contactId){const c=byId.get(o.contactId)||{id:o.contactId,tags:[]};candidates.set(o.contactId,{...(candidates.get(o.contactId)||{}),contact:c,stale24h:true});}}let tagAdds=0, taskCreates=0;for(const [cid,item] of candidates){const c=item.contact||{};const existing=new Set((c.tags||[]).map(x=>String(x)));const toAdd=[];if(item.stale24h && !existing.has('needs-followup-24h')) toAdd.push('needs-followup-24h');if(item.inbound10m && !existing.has('l2-inbound-waiting-10m')) toAdd.push('l2-inbound-waiting-10m');if(toAdd.length){await addTags(cid,toAdd);tagAdds+=toAdd.length;}const tasks=await getTasks(cid);if(item.stale24h){const title='Follow-up required: no activity >24h';const body='L2 watchdog: No follow-up activity detected for over 24 hours. Review contact/opportunity and perform next approved follow-up action.';if(!hasMatchingOpenTask(tasks,'Follow-up required: no activity',body)){const due=new Date(now.getTime()+60*60*1000).toISOString();await createTask(cid,title,body,due);taskCreates++;}}if(item.inbound10m){const title='URGENT: First follow-up due (>10m waiting)';const body='L2 watchdog: New inbound lead has been waiting over 10 minutes without confirmed follow-up. Prioritize first response workflow.';if(!hasMatchingOpenTask(tasks,'URGENT: First follow-up due',body)){const due=new Date(now.getTime()+5*60*1000).toISOString();await createTask(cid,title,body,due);taskCreates++;}}}const actions=tagAdds+taskCreates; if(actions>0){console.log('Applied '+actions+' actions ('+tagAdds+' tag updates, '+taskCreates+' tasks created).');} else {console.log('');}})().catch(e=>{console.error('ERR',e.message);process.exit(1);});\"","workdir":"C:\\Users\\JeremiahVanWagner\\.openclaw\\workspace","timeout":120}
